beliefs.subject: record_overflow() — velocity gate in callers not callee
beliefs.predicate: invariant violated at 3rd call site (OomKill handler)
beliefs.pattern: Fix-N-minus-1: invariant in callers not callee → must be re-applied at every new call site
evidence: learning_tick.rs:534: OomKill handler calls record_overflow() without swap_growing_fast gate
main.rs:2463: kqueue Critical path has gate
main.rs:4798: overflow_guard path has gate
3rd path discovered by recursive audit — would have been missed in code review
beliefs.root_cause: Locality violation: the invariant lives in 2 callers instead of the callee. Every new caller must independently implement it.

beliefs.subject: swap_predictor.rs — cycles_remaining * 5.0 as i32 overflow
beliefs.predicate: very slow swap growth → overflow → negative time_to_critical via Some(-n)
beliefs.pattern: Arithmetic overflow: physical quantity (time) stored in i32 without range guard
evidence: swap_predictor.rs:182: Some((cycles_remaining * 5.0).round() as i32)
cycles_remaining can be 18e9 for 1 byte/cycle growth → wraps i32::MAX → negative
Consumer in predictive_agent: 1.0/(1.0 + secs as f64) with negative secs → urgency > 1.0
Option<i32> fix replaced -1 sentinel but still allows any negative from overflow
beliefs.root_cause: Semantic type mismatch: time is always non-negative, i32 allows negatives. Should clamp before cast or use saturating conversion.

beliefs.subject: HazardModel validate_after_restore() — denominator drift
beliefs.predicate: resets total_events=0 but preserves total_hours → base_rate ≈ 0 after long uptime
beliefs.pattern: Coupled ratio managed as independent fields: base_rate=events/hours, reset events→0 without resetting hours→valid_window
evidence: hazard_model.rs:196: validate_after_restore resets total_events=0
hazard_model.rs:200: total_hours preserved (months of uptime)
After reset: base_rate = 1/(2000+24)*3600 ≈ 1.37e-7 → model blind to real OOM
tick_no_event() further inflates denominator each cycle
beliefs.root_cause: Two halves of a ratio (events/hours) managed independently. Reset events=0 makes base_rate ≈ 0 when hours is large.

beliefs.subject: Wake detection — missing display_turbo thaw in post-wake grace path
beliefs.predicate: frozen_state cleared on wake, display_turbo.turbo_frozen_pids stays frozen
beliefs.pattern: Asymmetric state management: two registries of same concept, wake only clears one
evidence: main.rs:1494-1497: wake path clears frozen_state, sends SIGCONT
main.rs:1513: display_turbo.set_dwell_secs() called but no thaw
turbo_frozen_pids PIDs remain SIGSTOP'd after wake until ghost reconciliation (next cycle) or DeactivateTurbo (next display-on)
Agent found: no post-wake thaw for turbo_frozen_pids
beliefs.root_cause: display_turbo was added after wake detection path — asymmetry invisible at code review time. Pre-sleep was written with both, wake was not updated.

beliefs.subject: causal_graph.rs avg_delta — updated only on positive outcomes
beliefs.predicate: systematic downward bias: impact_score trends to zero over long uptime
beliefs.pattern: Asymmetric EMA update: one direction trained, other silent → drift toward zero
evidence: causal_graph.rs:123: avg_delta only updated when delta > 0.0
Neutral/negative outcomes silently skipped → avg_delta never moves back down
impact_score = confidence * avg_delta → trends to 0 from avg_delta side
decide_actions priority based on impact_score degrades over time
beliefs.root_cause: Original code presumably only tracked positive causal effects. Zero-valued avg_delta is a latent bug: high-confidence edges lose impact ranking after enough non-positive cycles.

beliefs.subject: record_overflow() hours_since_last always hardcoded 1.0
beliefs.predicate: base_rate systematically miscalibrated — 10 kills in 10 min treated as 10h apart
beliefs.pattern: Hardcoded placeholder that was never wired to actual measurement
evidence: learning_tick.rs:538: 1.0 comment says conservative
main.rs:2469: same hardcoded 1.0 on kqueue path
No last_oom_timestamp in SignalIntelligence or HazardModel
total_hours = total_events * 1.0 always — fully redundant with total_events
beliefs.root_cause: API designed for actual inter-event time but never implemented. Conservative comment suggests the author knew it was a placeholder.
